execution_analysis.suggested_action: rewrite processor or script blocks using verified API and rerun static + mission verification
evidence_lines: ***** FATAL: Could not process input files.

repair_recommendation.suggested_action: rewrite processor or script blocks using verified API and rerun static + mission verification

preconditions: apply the recommended repair at the routed stage
rerun static_checker_v1 after the repair changes the script text
rerun mission.exe only after the regenerated script passes static verification

repaired_text:
antenna_pattern SEARCH_RADAR_ANTENNA
   constant_pattern
      peak_gain 30 dB
      azimuth_beamwidth 20 deg
      elevation_beamwidth 20 deg
   end_constant_pattern
end_antenna_pattern

platform_type FIGHTER WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 250 m/sec
      minimum_speed 60 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor fighter_radar WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 2 sec
      minimum_range 0 nm
      maximum_range 80 nm
      reports_location
      reports_range
      reports_bearing
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_RADAR_ANTENNA
         power 150 kw
         pulse_width 2.0e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 400 hz
         frequency 1285 mhz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_RADAR_ANTENNA
         bandwidth 1 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
   processor engage_proc WSF_SCRIPT_PROCESSOR
      execute at_interval_of 10 s
         writeln("Fighter engaging");
      end_execute
   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform blue_fighter FIGHTER
   side blue
   heading 45 deg
   route
      position 30.67n 104.07e altitude 3000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
      position 30.80n 104.25e altitude 3000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor fighter_radar
      on
   end_sensor
end_platform

platform red_fighter FIGHTER
   side red
   heading 225 deg
   route
      position 30.92n 104.37e altitude 3000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
      position 30.80n 104.25e altitude 3000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor fighter_radar
      on
   end_sensor
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/air_to_air_1v1.aer
end_event_pipe

end_time 300 sec
